heading: DISTRICT CHARTER AUTHORIZATION
operative_text: Notwithstanding Section 12.052, in the manner provided by this section, the board of trustees of a school district or the governing body of a home-rule school district may grant a district charter to a campus to the extent authorized under this section.

defined_terms.definition_excerpt: the board of trustees of a school district or the governing body of a home-rule school district may grant a district charter to a campus to the extent authorized under this section

_note: Subsection (b) establishes a 15 percent enrollment cap with a feeder-pattern floor; subsection (c) allows charter for lowest-performing campuses; subsection (d) treats campus as open-enrollment charter school under Subchapter D; subsection (e) exempts from §12.101 charter cap; subsection (f) grants commissioner rulemaking authority.
